defect: {} with cutting opening defect, it appears as a dark rectangular region spanning the entire image width, featuring irregular jagged edges and localized surface roughness
{} with longitudinal crack defect, it appears as one or more darker, narrow, linear forms of elongated cracks running vertically through the material, featuring irregular edges and varying widths

{} with scratch defect, it appears as brighter elongated streaks or patches consisting of multiple narrow, linear features with slight jaggedness, exhibiting higher reflectivity than the surrounding material surface
{} with welding slag defect, it appears as irregular fracture patterns with sharp-edged, jagged morphologies surrounded by localized surface roughness and texture variations
{} with water slag mark defect, it appears as  circular discolorations with irregular boundaries, creating strong contrast through either darkening or lightening effects against the base material

{} with slag skin defect, it appears as  a fragmented surface with an irregular triangular shape, where one side is slightly curved and the other sides are more jagged, with dark cracks appearing at the edges

good: {} is a cylindrical object with visible texture, which should be without any damage
{} is a cylindrical object with visible texture, which should be without any flaw
{} is a cylindrical object with visible texture, which should be without any defect
{} is a cylindrical object with visible texture, which should be without any faults
{} is a cylindrical object with visible texture, which should be without any scratches
{} is a cylindrical object with visible texture, which should be without any depressions
{} is a cylindrical object with visible texture, which should be without any bumps
{} is a cylindrical object with visible texture, which should be without any irregularities
defect: {} with warp defect in cylindrical object with a textured surface, it appears narrow, elongated dark cracks that destroy the surface texture. These cracks are irregular in shape, semi-circular, partially warped, and sometimes accompanied by a sense of concavity and convexity

{} with external fold defect in cylindrical object with a textured surface, it appears as  a darker, narrow, jagged slanting line that runs from the upper right to the lower left, destroying the original texture; the vertical length of this line spans the entire image

{} with wrinkle defect in cylindrical object with a textured surface, it appears as pronounced elongated depressions characterized by distinct shadowing effects along their edges and alternating bright spot formations

{} with scratch defect in cylindrical object with a textured surface, it appears as  localized darker-toned depressions with irregular strip-like or rectangular geometries, featuring rough perimeter edges that significantly degrade the surrounding texture uniformity
